error.A plugin failed to load and could not be: A plugin failed to load and could not be restored from backup. Please reinstall it
error.A plugin failed to load and may be unava: A plugin failed to load and may be unavailable until you reinstall or update it
error.Applied settings but could not reload th: Applied settings but could not reload the network
error.Could not read the submitted form: Could not read the submitted form
error.Failed to send OTP. Please try again lat: Failed to send OTP. Please try again later
error.Failed to stage the uploaded software re: Failed to stage the uploaded software release
error.File size exceeds maximum allowed limit: File size exceeds maximum allowed limit
error.Input value does not meet the required m: Input value does not meet the required minimum
Input value does not meet the required minimum characters
error.Input value exceeds the maximum allowed: Input value exceeds the maximum allowed
Input value exceeds the maximum allowed characters
error.Input value must be a number: Input value must be a number
error.Input value must be a valid decimal numb: Input value must be a valid decimal number
error.Input value must be a valid email: Input value must be a valid email
error.Input value must be a valid integer: Input value must be a valid integer
error.Invalid file type. Only .bin and .img fi: Invalid file type. Only .bin and .img files are allowed
error.Invalid file type. Upload a .bin or .img: Invalid file type. Upload a .bin or .img firmware image, or a software release archive
error.No LAN interfaces are available to confi: No LAN interfaces are available to configure
error.No admin theme is installed. Install an: No admin theme is installed. Install an admin theme plugin to choose one here.
error.No portal theme is installed. Install a: No portal theme is installed. Install a portal theme plugin to choose one here.
error.Password must be at least 6 characters: Password must be at least 6 characters
error.Required packages for a plugin could not: Required packages for a plugin could not be installed, possibly due to an unstable internet connection. It will be retried automatically when the machine reconnects
error.Settings saved but could not be applied: Settings saved but could not be applied to the network
error.The plugin <% .pkg %> could not be built: The plugin <% .pkg %> could not be built and was skipped during the software update. The rest of the update was applied; try updating this plugin again later
error.The plugin <% .pkg %> was disabled becau: The plugin <% .pkg %> was disabled because it has been withdrawn from the store by its developer and can no longer be installed or updated
The plugin <% .pkg %> was disabled because it is not purchased for this machine. Purchase it to re-enable it on the next restart
error.The portal interface must be one with th: The portal interface must be one with the captive portal enabled
error.The uploaded firmware is not compatible: The uploaded firmware is not compatible with this device
error.This software release was built for a di: This software release was built for a different system type and cannot be installed on this machine
error.Unable to Download Updates From Github: Unable to Download Updates From Github
error.Unable to Install From Zip File: Unable to Install From Zip File
error.Unable to apply the IP address to an int: Unable to apply the IP address to an interface
error.Unable to identify your device from the: Unable to identify your device from the network

info.A firmware file has been uploaded and is: A firmware file has been uploaded and is ready to be installed. The device will be flashed and rebooted
info.API URL for production releases. Leave d: API URL for production releases. Leave default for local dev server.
info.Activation successful. The system is reb: Activation successful. The system is rebooting to complete setup. The page will reload automatically
info.Clear all device fingerprints and old MA: Clear all device fingerprints and old MAC address records. The current MAC address for each device will be kept.
info.Click \"Check for updates\" above to see: Click "Check for updates" above to see available plugin updates
Click "Check for updates" above to see the installed plugins
Click "Check for updates" above to see the plugins that will be updated
info.Click the button below to reboot the sys: Click the button below to reboot the system. The system will be unavailable for a few minutes during the reboot process
info.Continuing this update will uninstall th: Continuing this update will uninstall these plugins, which are no longer part of their bundle
info.Firmware upgrade in progress. Do not pow: Firmware upgrade in progress. Do not power off the device
info.Install a firmware image or a software r: Install a firmware image or a software release from a file for advanced users
info.Install firmware from a file for advance: Install firmware from a file for advanced users
info.Leave both blank to keep the current add: Leave both blank to keep the current address. Saved changes take effect only after you click Apply Changes.
info.New plugin versions are ready to install: New plugin versions are ready to install
info.No LAN interfaces are available to confi: No LAN interfaces are available to configure.
info.No static IP addresses to apply: No static IP addresses to apply
Only upload files from trusted sources. An invalid firmware image or software release may damage your device
info.Only upload firmware files from trusted: Only upload firmware files from trusted sources. Invalid firmware may damage your device
info.Please wait a few minutes before reconne: Please wait a few minutes before reconnecting
info.Please wait while the plugins are being: Please wait while the plugins are being compiled. Do not close this page or turn off the device
info.Please wait while the update is being do: Please wait while the update is being downloaded. Do not close this page or turn off the device
info.Please wait while we upload and verify y: Please wait while we upload and verify your firmware file
info.Plugin updates are installed separately: Plugin updates are installed separately from the system software
info.Plugins are updated together with the sy: Plugins are updated together with the system software so they stay compatible
info.Required to release plugins to local ser: Required to release plugins to local server.
info.Required to release plugins to productio: Required to release plugins to production server.
info.SQLite is a file-based database The data: SQLite is a file-based database The database file is stored locally on the device
info.Select a .bin or .img firmware image, or: Select a .bin or .img firmware image, or a software release (.tar.gz) file
info.Select a theme for the admin dashboard: Select a theme for the admin dashboard
info.Select a theme for the captive portal lo: Select a theme for the captive portal login page
info.System is rebooting. Please wait a few m: System is rebooting. Please wait a few minutes before reconnecting
info.System is shutting down. The device will: System is shutting down. The device will power off shortly
info.The device will be flashed with new firm: The device will be flashed with new firmware and will reboot. Do not power off the device during this process
info.The portal interface's address hosts the: The portal interface's address hosts the captive portal and custom domain. Captive interfaces redirect their clients to that address (so clients on a different subnet can reach it), get traffic shaping, and can reach each other. Interfaces without the captive portal are left completely untouched.
info.The software is booting, please wait: The software is booting, please wait
info.The software is updating. This will take: The software is updating. This will take a few minutes, please wait
info.The system will be completely powered of: The system will be completely powered off and will require manual intervention to restart
info.These plugins could not be built during: These plugins could not be built during this update
info.These plugins will be rebuilt for the ne: These plugins will be rebuilt for the new core and updated when you install the system update
info.This device needs to be activated before: This device needs to be activated before you can use it. Please provide the Machine ID to your administrator
info.This interface's address hosts the capti: This interface's address hosts the captive portal and custom domain. Every captive interface redirects its clients to it. It must be an interface with the captive portal enabled.
info.This will erase all settings and install: This will erase all settings and installed packages
info.When on, this interface gets the captive: When on, this interface gets the captive portal, traffic shaping, and can reach other captive interfaces. When off, it is left completely untouched and free to be configured any way.
info.You are running the latest version: You are running the latest version
info.You can continue the update and skip the: You can continue the update and skip them — they keep their current version and the rest of the update is applied — or cancel the entire software update
info.You can continue the update and uninstal: You can continue the update and uninstall them on the next reboot, or abort the entire software update and keep them
info.You can perform the firmware upgrade lat: You can perform the firmware upgrade later from the Updates page
info.You have a pending purchase. Please comp: You have a pending purchase. Please complete it before proceeding

label.Are you sure you want to reboot the syst: Are you sure you want to reboot the system? This will disconnect all users
label.Are you sure you want to release this pl: Are you sure you want to release this plugin

label.I understand that this will delete all d: I understand that this will delete all data
label.Name: Name
label.Paste your local server access token: Paste your local server access token
label.Paste your production server access toke: Paste your production server access token
label.Please wait while we connect you: Please wait while we connect you
label.Plugin Will Be Removed on the Next Resta: Plugin Will Be Removed on the Next Restart

success.Device network details updated, reconnec: Device network details updated, reconnected successfully
success.OTP sent to your linked email: OTP sent to your linked email
success.Software release uploaded and staged. Re: Software release uploaded and staged. Reboot to apply the update
success.Software updates downloaded successfully: Software updates downloaded successfully. Reboot to apply

warning.Are you sure you want to cancel this pur: Are you sure you want to cancel this purchase
warning.Are you sure you want to reset the datab: Are you sure you want to reset the database All data will be lost
warning.Save stores your settings. Apply Changes: Save stores your settings. Apply Changes writes the configured IP addresses to the machine's network and reloads it — this can briefly interrupt connectivity.
The machine has no internet connection. Some features that depend on the cloud are unavailable until connectivity is restored
warning.The selected theme is not installed or f: The selected theme is not installed or failed to load. Falling back to the built-in core theme.
warning.The selected theme is not valid or not i: The selected theme is not valid or not installed. Please select a valid theme.
warning.There are <% .count %> sessions created: There are <% .count %> sessions created over 90 days ago that have never been started.
warning.There are <% .count %> vouchers created: There are <% .count %> vouchers created over 90 days ago that were never used.
warning.This will delete all data from the datab: This will delete all data from the database and recreate the schema This action cannot be undone
warning.This will reboot the system. All active: This will reboot the system. All active sessions will be terminated
warning.This will shut down the system. All acti: This will shut down the system. All active sessions will be terminated
